name: Ryujin
bio: Silent and swift, Ryujin is the cold steel of Kyokazura. As Kazuro's most trusted protector, he watches over the mountain trails and tests all who seek the tribe's aid. Clad in silver and dark blue armor, his movements are fluid and ghost-like—earning him the title Frost Shadow. Ryujin once fought beside Solas and holds deep respect for his legacy. Though cold at first, he recognizes Reign's resolve and leads him to Kazuro. Bound by honor and steeped in the old ways, Ryujin is both guardian and gatekeeper—ensuring that only those with pure intent ascend the sacred path.
A warrior of the hidden village whose people were once saved by Reign's brother, Solas; fights alongside Reign in the final battle.
